faq.question: How much does window replacement cost in San Mateo?
faq.answer: San Mateo homeowners typically invest $7,000 to $16,000 for a full window replacement project. This large Peninsula city offers projects across all price points — from Bay Meadows condos to Hillsborough-adjacent Baywood estates. Baywood and Beresford Park homes with 15–20 windows typically run $12,000–$18,000. Single window installation starts at approximately $590.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for window replacement in San Mateo?
faq.answer: Yes. San Mateo requires a building permit for window replacements. Our team handles all permit applications with the City of San Mateo Building Division on your behalf.

faq.question: Which window brands does Deluxe Windows install in San Mateo?
faq.answer: For San Mateo's Peninsula market, we most frequently install Milgard Tuscany vinyl for standard replacement projects, Andersen 400-Series for Baywood and Beresford Park homes where wood interiors matter, and Milgard Ultra fiberglass for Bay-side properties near Foster City Boulevard.

faq.question: Does Deluxe Windows serve all San Mateo neighborhoods?
faq.answer: Yes — we serve all San Mateo neighborhoods including Baywood, Beresford Park, Bay Meadows, Fiesta Gardens, and Shoreview. Zip codes: 94401, 94402, 94403, 94404.
